title: Project scaffolding
summary: Project scaffolding complete — Go project builds, tests pass, sanity check works, version flags work, docs created.

implementation.evidence: go build ./... exits 0. Module github.com/amattn/logalyzer compiles with no errors.

criteria.description: go test ./... runs and passes with a sanity check test

implementation.evidence: go test ./... passes: cmd/logalyzer (0.468s), internal/parser (cached). TestSanity and TestVersionFlag both pass.

criteria.description: Sanity test asserts true; changing to false makes it fail

implementation.evidence: TestSanity in internal/parser/sanity_test.go asserts want := true, got := true. Changing want to false causes FAIL: sanity_test.go:11: sanity check failed: got true, want false. Test infra is verified.
TestVersionFlag in cmd/logalyzer/main_test.go builds binary and tests both --version and -v flags. Both output 'logalyzer v0.1.0-dev'. Test passes.

criteria.description: CLAUDE.md, PLET.md, and README.md exist with appropriate content

implementation.evidence: CLAUDE.md created with project overview, build commands, conventions, and plet reference. PLET.md created with verification commands and iteration conventions. README.md created with overview, setup, usage examples, test instructions, and project structure.
